name: Age Verification Demo
description: Demonstrate proving age >= 18 without revealing birth date

policies.name: Age Verification Only
policies.description: Allow businesses to verify age without revealing birth date

walkthrough.title: User Setup
walkthrough.description: User has birth date stored in encrypted context store
walkthrough.action: View 'My Context' tab in User App

walkthrough.title: Business Request
walkthrough.description: Business requests age verification for entry
walkthrough.action: Submit verification request in Business App

walkthrough.title: User Review
walkthrough.description: User sees exactly what's being requested

walkthrough.title: User Approval
walkthrough.description: User approves - ZK proof is generated

walkthrough.title: Business Receives Proof
walkthrough.description: Business gets verified: true/false - never sees birth date
